title: TechScreen feature-flag YAML contract (T05a, FR-006)
description: Schema for entries in configs/feature-flags.yaml. Every flag the project has ever had appears here (active or sunset). Sunset entries remain forever (constitution §1, FR-011).

flags.description: Every declared flag — active and sunset alike.

name.description: Snake-case identifier referenced verbatim by is_enabled() call sites and by the feature_flag.name DB primary key.

default.description: Initial enabled state when the row is first synced into the DB. After the first sync the DB value may diverge from this whenever an operator flips the runtime state.

default_value.description: Reserved for future non-boolean payloads (mirrors the feature_flag.default_value JSONB column). Unused at MVP.

description.description: One short paragraph in English explaining what flipping this flag does.

state.description: Lifecycle. 'active' = live flag with at least one in-code call site. 'sunset' = retired flag; entry stays in the file forever (FR-011) and must have sunset_pr + sunset_date.

sunset_pr.description: GitHub PR back-reference for the PR that sunsetted the flag (required when state=sunset).

sunset_date.description: ISO date the flag was sunsetted (required when state=sunset).
